description.p: rayslash is a lightweight keyboard-first launcher for Linux desktops. It searches installed desktop applications and configured folder sources from a compact native Slint window. Optional capabilities are installed on demand as verified modules.
The app is designed for desktop-managed shortcuts and exposes rayslash toggle for resident show and hide behavior.
Refine module management and settings, improve launcher responsiveness, and add RPM, DEB, Flatpak, and AppImage releases.
Harden installable module lifecycle and publish complete Fedora app and host package sets.
Initial public packaging metadata and Linux integration files.
